personas.name: Frustrated Technical User
personas.description: A regular Headspace user who depends on the app for daily meditation but becomes frustrated when technical issues prevent sessions from loading or the app crashes.
goals: Use the app without crashes or bugs
pain_points: Sessions failing to load or connect
context: Using the app daily for meditation practice
Opening sessions during scheduled relaxation time
constraints: The app must load sessions quickly

personas.name: Cost-Conscious User
personas.description: A user interested in meditation and mindfulness but hesitant to subscribe because most content is locked behind a paywall.
goals: Access meditation content at a reasonable price
Evaluate the value of the subscription
context: Exploring the free version of the app
Considering whether to upgrade to premium
constraints: Some useful features should remain accessible without subscription

personas.name: Sleep Improvement Seeker
personas.description: A user who relies on guided sleep content and relaxation exercises to improve sleep quality and reduce stress.
context: Listening to relaxation exercises before bedtime
constraints: Sleep content should be easy to access

personas.name: Navigation-Frustrated User
personas.description: A user who values meditation features but struggles with confusing interface updates and difficulty finding content.
context: Trying to follow guided courses in the app
constraints: Navigation should remain consistent across updates
Important features must be easy to locate

personas.name: Dissatisfied Subscriber
personas.description: A paying user who expects fair billing practices and responsive customer support when issues occur.
goals: Resolve issues quickly with customer support
context: Managing subscription settings within the app
